reason: This is a standard STIG hardening rule for PAM configuration to lock out the root account after failed login attempts. The remediation leverages authselect or authconfig tools, which automate changes and include safety checks (e.g., integrity validation) to minimize the risk of misconfiguration or service disruption.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; filesystems affected; Potential root account lockout if PAM entries are incorrectly defined; Service interruption if PAM files are corrupted during manual edits
